title: How to Create Custom Skills in Claude  (Step-by-Step)
summary: Code With Aarohi demonstrates how to create custom skills in Claude to control model output behavior. The video shows creating a "Smart PDF Analyzer" skill that produces structured summaries with specific formatting rather than generic output from the same prompt and file.
